code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  mut total = 0
  mut eof = false
  while not eof
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(line)
      let n = string.len(line)
      mut i = 0
      mut s1 = true
      while s1
        if i >= n
          s1 = false
        else
          match string.byte_at(line, i)
          when Some(b)
            if b == 32 or b == 9
              i = i + 1
            else
              s1 = false
            end
          when None
            s1 = false
          end
        end
      end
      mut r1 = true
      while r1
        if i >= n
          r1 = false
        else
          match string.byte_at(line, i)
          when Some(b)
            if b == 32 or b == 9
              r1 = false
            else
              i = i + 1
            end
          when None
            r1 = false
          end
        end
      end
      mut s2 = true
      while s2
        if i >= n
          s2 = false
        else
          match string.byte_at(line, i)
          when Some(b)
            if b == 32 or b == 9
              i = i + 1
            else
              s2 = false
            end
          when None
            s2 = false
          end
        end
      end
      let start = i
      mut r2 = true
      while r2
        if i >= n
          r2 = false
        else
          match string.byte_at(line, i)
          when Some(b)
            if b == 32 or b == 9
              r2 = false
            else
              i = i + 1
            end
          when None
            r2 = false
          end
        end
      end
      if start < i
        let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          total = total + v
        when None
          total = total
        end
      end
    when None
      eof = true
    end
  end
  println("sum=#{total}")
end
